name: powerpoint-pptx
tagline: ClawHub (143★): Create, inspect, and edit Microsoft PowerPoint presentations and PPTX decks with reliable layouts, templates, placeholders,
verdict: Entirely abstract: the whole skill is principle-level prose with zero concrete commands, tool names, or file paths, so an agent following it has no working steps to execute and will improvise blindly. No out-of-scope guidance either, and even its own name field is malformed.
